title: reichardia gaditana subsp. lusitanica
intro: Reichardia gaditana subsp. lusitanica, also known as Lusitanian hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Reichardia gaditana subsp. lusitanica can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
